style_guide_prompt: Create a clean 2D illustrated mascot sticker for a children's ear-training app. Keep a soft rounded cartoon style, consistent line weight, gentle shading, and cheerful expression. Use transparent background, centered composition, and no text.

assets.subject_prompt: A friendly fox facing front with bright eyes and small smile.
A cute blue whale mascot facing front with a tiny water spout.
A happy green frog mascot facing front with rounded body.
A friendly orange tiger mascot facing front with soft stripes.
A playful purple octopus mascot facing front with short rounded tentacles.
A cheerful yellow chick mascot facing front with tiny wings.
A pink bunny mascot facing front with long ears and smile.
A teal turtle mascot facing front with patterned shell.
A small indigo-blue bird mascot facing front with open wings.
A golden lion mascot facing front with rounded mane.
A lime green parrot mascot facing front with colorful beak.
A cyan fish mascot facing front with curved fins.
A silver-gray seal mascot facing front with whiskers.
A coral-red crab mascot facing front with friendly claws.
A rounded gear icon inside a soft circle badge for caregiver settings.
A shiny gold star badge icon with simple sparkles.
